title: SPAIN enforcement action against Housing Association (450)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 450 on a housing association. The DPA ordered the controller to take measures following a GDPR infringement. However, the controller failed to inform the DPA that these measures had been taken. Legal basis: Art. 58 (2) GDPR.
dedupKey: spain enforcement action against housing association 450|2026-03-13
